name: cpp
description: Memory and resource safety review plus cross-platform build hardening for modern C++ projects and Node.js native addons.

interface.shortDescription: Review native safety and harden C++ builds
interface.longDescription: Two evidence-focused workflows for proving C++ memory and resource defects and assessing cross-platform native build hardening.
defaultPrompt: Trace this native code for proven memory or resource defects.
